SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable

Class DefaultFailoverObserver

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.DefaultFailoverObserver
All Implemented Interfaces:
FailoverObserver
public class DefaultFailoverObserver extends Object implements FailoverObserver
Default FailoverObserver that scans for all @Failover-annotated methods and publishes a startup summary metric for each one.
Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DefaultFailoverObserver(ObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)
    Creates a reporter with all required collaborators.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    observe()
    Observes all registered @Failover configurations and publishes to ObservablePublisher instances.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultFailoverObserver

      public DefaultFailoverObserver(ObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)
      Creates a reporter with all required collaborators.
      Parameters:
      observablePublisher - publisher that receives each failover metric
      failoverScanner - scans for all @Failover-annotated methods
      clock - clock used to record the service start time and report timestamp
      manifestInfoExtractor - extracts build metadata from MANIFEST.MF
      failoverExpiryExtractor - reads expiry configuration from @Failover annotations
      additionalInfo - extra properties (from FailoverProperties) included in every metric

  • Method Details

    • observe

      public void observe()
      Description copied from interface: FailoverObserver
      Observes all registered @Failover configurations and publishes to ObservablePublisher instances.
      Specified by:
      observe in interface FailoverObserver
